raw_consumer_statement: 0n XX/XX/2024 I placed an order on XXXX and paid {$790.00}. At same day seller email me said my order was shipped with XXXXXXXX XXXX number XXXX. But after XXXX week there is not information update at all. I contact seller and told me they drop off package at usps last week already. Ask me to wait few days more. I ask XXXX XXXX where they ship the package from. They told me they ship from XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX On XX/XX/2024 I still didnt get update so I contact seller again and request to cancel the order. Then seller send me screenshots from XXXX XXXX number XXXX. And it ship from XXXX, not XXXX XXXX! This seller keep gave me fake information and I didnt get the package at all and it marked delivered. I contact seller she ask me go to get the package in mailbox. But not there. And before package shipped seller contact me for XXXX XXXX and I reply the email with XXXX XXXX but seller didnt add it to shipping address too. I contact seller they not reply any more. I contact credit card company but they said XXXX tracking number both shows delivered so they cant help me get my money back. I also file police report too. Sell provide not truth information liar to customer to make purchase, hope CFPB could help me. Also seller website said company is in XXXX XXXX but address is XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX. Its not a real retailer. Please help. Appreciated!
